synergies.description: the speedup is great on top of the revive. a lot of champions adore playing with zilean.
can start up very good engage for you with his ultimate.
he has a ton of displacements and can engage very well.
can jump on someone and taunt them up, after which you can follow up with your pull.

kindred can use her ult so save one of your allies or herself, and then you can use your ultimate to take someone to the death realm if they are low health and kill them, giving you a guaranteed kill.
